Quiet and peaceful.
Toilets generally clean and staff in office lovely.
Great location near The Prom and Sandy point nearby which offered beach activities and walking tracks as we did.
On calmer days the foreshore was perfect.
Overall, a great holiday and a camp site well recommended.

The sites are huge. It was so lovely to spread out in a caravan park rather than be packed in like sardines. Such a serene spot to chill out right by the water and to have our poochs with us too. Thank for a wonderful holiday 🙏

Incredible staff. Very friendly, accommodating and informative. We were in a beautiful but exposed site the second night and the tents flapped so loudly in the wind that my 6yo couldn’t sleep. They very easily the next morning changed our location with no fuss and very understanding. Advised us on what beaches were safe to swim and which ones had a dangerous undertow. The camp sites were lovely and spread out which we appreciated all the more after seeing how crowded tidal river camp site was! Will definitely come back.
Great spot, clean and well-equipped.
Amazing park, can’t wait to come back in Summer.

We really enjoyed Inverloch despite the inclement weather.
The cabin we were in was clean and everything was great except there was a big puddle outside our door so that we had to walk through water to access or leave it.
The staff were all very pleasant & helpful.
Great place, amenities are plentiful. Loved the camp kitchen
Great staff and an excellent park
Great place to stay, friendly staff and great facilities. I would highly recommend. Especially  if you have kids.
One of cleanest accommodation I have experienced in many decades of travel!
A perfect stay with children. Parents can relax while the kids enjoy the facilities. Very close to the beach for a morning walk.
The receptionist is very accommodating.
Great for kids, wish we could have stayed longer. Will be back 😀

When I heard a barking cough from a nearby hut I knew the person had Kennel Cough. This site is a cross between a boarding kennel and a mining camp. The transportables have stark white lighting and a green plastic shower curtain. This place is a long way from superior accommodation at RACV Resort and I am not speaking about distance. Beach nearby and town 1.8 kms away for coffee. This is a children’s focus place not suitable for adults.

We had a stay in a two bedroom luxury villa, it was nice and modern. From checkout in to checkout and enquiries at reception, all staff were lovely and helpful. Amazing facilities, very family friendly. Will definitely be back

What a great place to take our granddaughter for a weekend.
Fantastic water park & heated indoor pool, mini golf,  jumping pillow & karts to hire.
Second time we've stayed and won't be the last.
Random short weekend away with. Friends & their  kids.  Plenty for kids to do .  Beds comfortable, NIl issues

We had a great time! The facilities were clean and well maintained. Our only suggestion would be to open the swimming pool and water play area at 7am instead of 9am, so kids can enjoy one last play before the 10am checkout.

First time staying, had a great time.
Will definitely come back again my son had a blast so much fun things for the whole family. Beautiful location!
Exceptional park very close to beach, great amenities especially for kids.

Such a beautiful maintained caravan park. Clean facilities, seem almost brand new, grassy spot which we love and right on the beach! This did not disappoint, so clean and friendly staff! Also 2 min walk to a pump teach which the kids loved! Would definitely return and highly recommend! Also brought our dog and that was epic!!

Well where do I start, from the moment I rang to make a booking I new we were going to have a great stay, when we arrived the staff we super friendly and the park is one of the best we have stayed in, grounds were lovely and clean, amenities were super clean and it was lovely seeing all the fire pits at night time.  We will defiantly be back again in February on our way back from Tasmania to Sunshine Coast.  NO FUEL AT SEASPRAY
Had trouble with our van's electricity supply and the owner spent an hour trouble shooting for us. Amazing service, clean and well appointed.
All amenities are nice and clean, Chatty staff, large plots. 2 mins from Nine mile beach. A1+
Amazing place to have a quiet holiday.
Seaspray Caravan Park is a large park next to the beach. The sites are level with thick green grass. The amenities are modern and clean. Staff are very friendly.

Seaspray is a family staple for me and my family. We love the location, the beach and the sites. Great for bike rides, kids and dogs.
My only nitpick is that it can get pretty windy and very cold.
We love this place and I would recommend.

Fairly new caravan park. Very new and clean facilities. Ocean beach just across the road. No shade trees but you don't have to worry about branches falling on your van or tent. Highly recommended to stay here.

🌟 🌟 🌟 🌟 🌟
I am actually disappointed that we chose Seaspray Caravan Park to be our first ever trip away in our new camper.
The facilities were so nice, new and clean. The people in the front office were absolutely wonderful. The spaces are rather big and it's only a short walk to the beach.
I just know other caravan park going forward will not live up to the greatness of this park!!! Cannot wait to come back here.

An excellent caravan park, with the ability tk camp, park up a caravan or, rent a cabin. Right beside 90 mile Beach, which is spectacular and clean. Very little people around. Facilities are top notch and extremely clean. Full kitchen, and bathroom facilities are available. With a large TV and foosball table available for everyone to enjoy. Dog and child friendly. Each site has water, electricity and waste points available. Staff managing the park are fantastic, friendly, warm, welcoming and helpful. A must visit for a fantastic remote getaway.

Fabulous place to stay. Staff are very very friendly and welcoming, nothing is too much trouble and they are very flexible. Easy walk to the 90 mile beach. Amenities and surrounds are immaculate. Definitely worth a visit.

All the way from WA.... We loved this park immaculate ammentities tucked behind the magnificent vista of Bass Strait and right on the 90 mile Beach. We extended our stay on arrival because the vibe location staff and layout was so appealing. Jenny is a delightful young woman so customer service orientated with such a lovely personality...Kim equally as delightful has a gem in Jen Thankyou we will be back if and when possible and certainly will recommend this destination and Caravan Park Rhonda and Charles
Tranquillity

Super well-maintained complex right by the sea. There wasn't much going on, so we had a complete meadow opposite the jumping pillow. Seaspray is known for its wind and we could feel it, but it didn't bother us and we had a really great stay.

Such an amazing park. Beautiful grounds and the amenities are spotless. The staff are so helpful and nothing is too much trouble l. Highly recommend. Will definitely be coming back next year. Such a lovely spot. The beach is amazing and so clean.
Very clean, sparkling amenities, but lacks shade. Close to the beach but can't see it.

Recht neuer Campingplatz mit sauberen und großzügigen Amenities direkt in Strandnähe mit eigenem Zugang. Sehr sympathische Aufnahme beim Check-In. Mit AUD 70 für eine Nacht bisher der teuerste Campingplatz auf unserer Reise. Es gibt Mücken und Fliegen, nicht viele, aber immerhin. Wer also empfindlich ist, sollte Insektizid-Spray dabei haben.
Over rated for monday of long weekend

Probably one of the best caravan parks I’ve been to. Incredibly accomodating to families with kids. Great playgrounds! Park is immaculate! Great facilities which are also immaculate! Owners/staff are lovely! Right on the beach. Dog friendly. I can’t fault this place, will definitely be back! The surf life saving club which is in walking distance and also dog friendly also has very nice meals! My scotch fillet was to die for! Thank you for a great stay!

Great place.  Clean,  well maintained park.  Friendly staff. Close walk to beach. Convenient camp kitchen available to use.
We camped with our dogs. Popular place for families and dog owners.  Would recommend!
We will be back.

Well presented park, with good clean facilities. Friendly & helpful staff. Very close to 90 mile beach for fishing and walking. Just a short stroll to Seaspray surf club patrolled beach.
The club also opens for meals and drinks, but opening times may vary.
Big sites, clean amenities and extremely friendly people. Dog friendly.

This place is heaven…why???…Uber gorgeous Jenni is so welcoming and helpful, the very spacious grassy sites and amazing modern and clean facilities. One of the best sites we stayed at on our trip around Oz.Highly recommend.

The cleanest, most well maintained campsite we’ve ever stayed in!
The staff were very friendly at check in and chose us a protected site based on the wind as we were one the only people in a swag.
We didn’t realise the proximity to a RAAF base and my husband loved it and spent half the time watching the planes.
Close to a beautiful beach, the whole town was gorgeous and very quiet.
No issues with mosquitoes at all, shame we could only stay one night.
Camped last night and it couldn't have been better. We loved the amenities, the location is second to none and the check in process was a joy! We will definitely be back.

Very disappointed they refused to refund my hard earned money with plenty of cancellation notice don’t be a victim like us no mention when cancelling of not refunding money only to send them email very poorly done 👎👎👎👎

Becareful wen booking here they took my full amount but I had to cancel they refused to pay the refund their policy is extremely confusing I hope they enjoy my donation 😡😡😡😡 very dissatisfied won’t be going back there complete scam

This is a very nice camping spot, right on the beach and within walking distance of the Surf Life Saving club and local general store which serves lovely fish and chips. Staff at the camp ground are friendly and helpful and facilities are clean and reliable. With no trees it can be quite windy but this is only a minor thing considering the positives. Sites are also nice and big|For larger buys than you can get at the local store, Sale is only 30 minutes away

We just spent 8 nights at Seaspray Caravan Park over New Year, and it was fantastic. From our friendly greeting the minute we arrived to check in, to the locals at the S.L.S.C. We loved every bit of our stay at this park. The powered sites are HUGE, the amenities look near new and are serviced daily and kept at a great standard of cleanliness, with swipe cards needed to access as a safety measure, the grounds are maintained beautifully, very family friendly, respectful behaviour by all, and the lovely young girl who worked behind the very popular icy pole and lolly desk was sunshine in human form.|We loved the beach, which is as promised, a stones throw away. Dinner at the SLSC was delicious, as was the food truck, and the pump bike track was definitely a hit with the kids. All in all 5 stars, would and have been recommending to everybody. We will be back.

First time here. Great location. Staff excellent to deal with. Receptionist just a legend to deal with. Sites are a good size
Will be back...
Great spot with easy access to the beach. Campsites are grassy and fairly large with power and water available. Can get quite windy but overall a great place to unwind and relax.
Well maintained shared amenities. Campsite layout works well to move cars around the site. Ideal for camping with pets and great beach access.
Proprietors are lovely and helpful, park is very well maintained and services/facilities are excellent.

I stayed in the luxury Safari tent and it was absolutely beautiful. So amazing and clean and the beds are extremely comfortable. It does get cold at night but there is an electric fire as well as a heater. The staff are amazing and the facilities are fantastic! 10 out of 10 experience

We visited Big 4 in June this year. Found the kids activities really good! We had initially booked the ensuite cabin but found it too small on arrival. The lovely staff upgraded us to their units which was so spacious.
Our kids 7 and 4 years old enjoyed the was park facilities and never got bored. Only a small feedback the indoor heated pool water felt a bit cold both the times we went in and also the splash pool water. I did raise it with the reception ladies who got someone to check it and confirmed they maintain it at that temperature always but our kids kept saying the water is cold, so did other kids in the pool(we went in the evening both times so not sure if it was like that in the day as well).
They also provide Tesla charging stations without charging any extra which was such a value add.
The location is close by the esplanade for a nice walk.
So all in all loved the location and facilities.
Look forward to going back again next school holidays:)

Thank you for the stay we had a great time. Just some feed back we would recommend an inside mat at the door as there is nowhere to wipe your feet especially when there is a puddle at the bottom of the stairs when you walk in. One of the blankets on the top bed was dirty and has white marks all over them, so these get washed after every guest? Lastly the indoor pool looks liked it needed a good clean the shallow part was all green around the edge. These items didn’t impact our stay but just wanted to let you know what we found. Thanks
Fantastic park! Friendly and inviting staff all throughout the place, a great range of family entertainment for all kids and adults!

Beautifully maintained Park with very spacious sites. Ensuite was clean  and airy. Customer Service was excellent and our Dog was welcome. Right next to Beach and 10 minute walk to shops. Would highly recommend 👌

Great family park – we’ll be back!
We had an amazing stay at this park perfect for families! The staff were absolutely fantastic: helpful, approachable, and genuinely welcoming from the moment we checked in to when we left. You can really tell they’ve got a great team working here!

There’s so much to do – we didn’t hear “I’m bored” once, which is always a win with kids. Plenty of activities kept everyone happy and entertained.

Only downside was the water splash park. It’s advertised as heated, and it is warm in the mornings, but by late afternoon in winter, it gets too cold to use… Luckily, the pool is warm enough that the kids were still happy.

Overall, we had a great experience and will definitely be back. Hoping we can snag a booking in summer next time!
Great place to stay especially if you have young kids. The park facilities are great and the staff and very nice and helpful.

We did a overnighter due to being there for sad family reasons but these guys went above and beyond to help and adjust any of whatever our needs were when they did have to at all. What we viewed in our lil stay was amazing and I would highly recommend staying here with family and friends as completely great area.
If I was on holiday with my family for a stay longer than a few days I wouldn’t choose the cabin we stayed in as too compact and small confined space but would work fantastic for a 2adults and 2children scenario

It’s a great place especially for families.  We were a couple staying in one of the cabins.  It was still quiet and peaceful for us. The only issue is we didn’t have somewhere comfy to sit in the sun.
Excellent service. Very clean rooms, nice and fresh. The holiday park is very big with lots of things to do inside. Highly recommend for families or couples

We stayed on a drive through site as we had a motorhome and loved it. The park amenities were clean and the staff were very friendly. The park is close to town and the big plus for us was they are pet friendly.
We always enjoy our time in Inverloch at Ingenia. Great place for kids & older folks.
Great little spot over Christmas must book 6 months in advance as to a perfect location fishing beach like twenty minutes from shopping centre

Had a fantastic time for a three night stay for our first timers in a caravan.  |Beautiful place grounds are lovely perfect place for surf fishing staff are wonderful toilet and showers building and laundry are 5 star.  Recommend for anyone for families good jumping pillow and bike tracks.
Awesome caravan park cleanliness is the best  l have ever seen Management fabulous can't find any faults ✔✔✔
Fantastic park. Immaculate facilities.
Very well maintained, large camp sites, great clean amenities. Happy friendly staff. Highly recommend

We stayed in the one cabin on site which is right opposite reception. Absolutely no privacy what so ever and the woman at reception seemed a little odd and overbearing. Felt very uncomfortable the entire stay.  Wont be back.
Beautiful caravan park, great facilities and friendly staff.

A week ago we stayed for 10 nites the park is clean and very well maintained with new showers and toilets. The van sites are huge 10m x 16m. Jenny welcomed us with open arms. $30 pn is great value. We recommend it.
Quiet and quiet 🤫

- Friendly and relatable staff
- 11am checkout
- Dog friendly
- Allows fire pits

Would give it 6 stars if I could
We had an amazing weekend away. Cabin and the park facilities were fantastic and clean! Highly recommend
We had a fabulous time, excellent location for families!!!
We spent a weekend in one of the luxury safari tents and it was the best! Lovely fire pit at the front, comfortable spaces. The kids loved the pool and the slides area.

We decided on a short 4 day holiday here. Mainly due to the kids activities. An indoor heated pool and a separate indoor heated splash park, as well as a giant jumping cushion.

On arrival it had been raining, however after settling in were able to take the kid swimming with no issues at all.

The cabins beds left alot to be desired. The kids loved it, mum n dad, not so much

EDIT - I sent a email with my details 2 weeks ago tomorrow and still haven’t received a phone call or email?

The ladies in the office were absolutely lovely, and the location along with the kids' facilities were great. Unfortunately, that’s where the positives ended for us.

We booked a powered grass site but ended up camping in what felt more like a swamp. While we understand there had been a lot of rain—which can’t be helped—better site drainage or temporary closure of affected sites would go a long way. The area clearly needs time for the grass to recover and the ground to firm up over winter months.

We hadn’t brought camping mats, as the website clearly states that floor coverings aren't allowed on grass sites. However, when I raised this with the manager, I was told the rule is actually just to prevent people from using carpets or tarps—which is quite different from what’s advertised. More clarity here would be helpful. The manager also said someone would come to lay mesh mats to help with the slippery ground, but no one ever showed up.

We tried calling the office multiple times around 5pm (despite Google listing the closing time as 6pm), left a voicemail, and never received a response.

To top it off, the female toilets were completely out of toilet paper every night, even after staff were informed. The issue remained unresolved during our stay.

We ended up checking out a day early because the experience just wasn’t enjoyable. We were told someone would follow up about our stay, but it’s now been over a week and we haven’t heard anything.

Really disappointing, especially given the potential this place has.
Nice park ,and facilities

Beautifull place amazing customer service 2nd time back and will defenantly be coming back more often no need to leav the caravan park so much to do my kids loveee it keeo them bussy from morning till night highly recommended, cabins also clean beds pillows all comfterble had a wonderfull stay
Great place, for families and children. Really lovely cabins and camp sites, good walking distance from cafes and shops :)
Would highly recommend great and friendly and beautiful for families?

Friendly staff and most helpful with your needs.
Terrific amenities and so much for the families to enjoy.
Security at premises excellent
Highly recommend
Julie V
Thanks for the hospitality and the park was awesome for us and our fur baby… very friendly staff ..will definitely come back next time we come back down here
It was an awesome stay .. the kids loved it and did not even want to leave .. thank you for making it a wonderful stay ..
We had such an amazing time, nice and clean units and staff were lovely. Our puppies & kids had a great time - the pool was great too!

Great facilities for young kids.
Friendly staff and clean rooms.
15m scenic walk to town.
We look forward to visiting again.
Amazing location, awesome park with great facilities for camping. We'll definitely visit again

Just amazing staff.  We hit a situation out of our control and they could not have been more helpful.  Hard to find this now a days. So impressed.  The family will see you again soon.
cheers. Peter McCorquodale
Cabin smelt like seafood! We arrived back from a morning out, disappointed to find the bikes had been locked away early. Grounds were well kept and the kids enjoyed the movie nights!

Positive: location was amazing, central spot.
Improvements: cleanliness and facility.
I’m not sure why, but a lot of places believe that they can open a business, furnish it, have many guests stay in it over the years but don’t think that they may need to re-purchase some items to keep the same standard they would have had in the beginning.

The sofa was so stained and unclean. It had a smell to it. I put towels over it before we sat down just due to the cleanliness. I don’t care how patterned the sofa that you bought is, but even with that much colour it still couldn’t hide the disgusting stains.

Other than that it was simply unclean. The cleaners obviously just wipe what they can see in a very quick clean rather than a deep clean between guests.

The most uncomfortable bed my husband and I have ever slept in. We have stayed in many RV resorts before and this one was simply the most uncomfortable, as hard as a rock.

We actually left a night early because we couldn’t stand the thought of another night on that bed.

We checked out the games room. Same deal, so unhygienic, dirty and old.

Great location though, would not stay again but would stay at any of the other places I’ve stayed at on my other visits to Lakes.

Fantastic holiday spot in Lakes Entrance. The amenities were prefect for the kids. Location is convenient to everything. Price was competitive. The cabin was cozy and self contained. Key highlight was the shower. The pressure was amazing. Overall, a highly recommended place to stay in Lakes Entrance. Till next time. Cheers!

I wanted to leave a review on the cleanliness of the facility.  Typically we only notice something when its dirty but I actually noticed how clean our cabin, surrounds and whole park was.

We enjoyed our stay, location was great, community was great and staff were friendly.

Arrived at Wednesdays night around 4 to 5 pm, 15th October 2025.
Left at 8 am Sunday 19 October 2025.
So, the cabin overall was good and I enjoyed it.
Cool things: VHS player still worked and I enjoyed using it. I got to wake up at 1 am to watch The Last Airbender haha. Kettle didn’t stink. It was actually pretty clean and I liked that.
Not so cool things: I’m thinking y’all should update your Wi-Fi to reach all cabins because I kept recharging my phones data. A few bugs were around and the cabin kinda shook.
Better things: I slept well the whole four to 5 days. I forgot our length of stay. But I loved it. Sleep was perfect. Sofa was nice. A few bugs and rubbish under the bed but it’s acceptable. I was ok with it all.
Overall rating: I’m pretty sure if I could rate out of 10 it’d probably be 3+3.14159265 stars . Or even a solid 8.
Stating again, maybe change your wifi to a stronger one and bug proof the cabins.
But that’s all ok. Also, the games room kinda scammed but I beat the punching bag game score, the score was 1230 and I got 7011. So cool! I also played that car racing game. I liked it. It wasn’t so bad.
Again, another overall thing,
I might actually come back. Prolly, prolly not. But still. Its awesome. Byee!

Probably the cleanest well organised park I have ever seen stay in.
Lots of room and parking for fishing boats as well
2 pools, bbq area , and everything Is spotless

We stayed with family, we used up 3 cabins between us in the garden views section. Was lovely and peaceful. Staff were lovely.
Felt it was a little pricey for what was offered. Little things like salt and pepper, cooking oil etc, would have just made cooking experience easier than having to buy everything....
Also, would recommend taking your own pillows unless you like hard pillows.
Unfortunately the pool was too cold to swim in but did look very inviting.
Mini golf and coffee van across the road was good and it wasn't too far to walk from the shops.
Would stay again.... will just bring my own pillow next time 😁

Great stay. We booked a a 1 bedroom unit. It felt quite spacious and well appointed. All the facilities inside you’d need. Heating, cooling well appointed kitchen. Also quiet. Cheerful, very helpful staff, each and everyone. Facilities are generous, maintained well and clean.  The pool/s (there are 4 sizes) are slightly heated so it’s not freezing, also very clean. The playground is fenced and large enough for many visitors. The bbq facilities, also kept very clean, was a great meeting area.
I lived the wild life, the birds outside the office are beautiful.
We came in March it’s a great time to travel.

The cabin was lovely and clean and comfortable the staff are lovely and caring would recommend it to anybody The pools are a bonus as we love to swim. As we don’t drive, they even offered to drive us to our bus stop
Nice quiet park, spotless grounds and rooms with all the amenities you need for a great holiday.
Great place really enjoyed our stay ,friendly staff eager to help in any way .great place for the family no writh thrafs nice a quiet definitely going back 👌
Room and facilities were very clean and well equipped. Great location, easy walk to the shops, water and activities and far enough away that it was very calm and peaceful. Really enjoyed our stay.

The cabin was faultlessly clean. Generally quiet. Pool was well maintained and after a 5hour drive the swim was refreshing. The park location is good and central to cafes and restaurants. As a smoker my wife appreciated the furnished patio.

Great Ensuite site and park. The facilities were of a high standard and offerring all that would be required for an extended stay. The Park receptionist was friendly and helpful and was able to accomodate us at the last minute.

The location is great and the staff were nice.

We stayed in a cabin and they are years outdated. The linen was old and the room was incredibly musty.

Was absolutely perfect.  Ensuite was clean and showers were lovely and hot.  Staff went above and beyond to accommodate our early check in.  They moved our site to help us when they could have just said sorry we are fully booked.  Lovely walk into town and around wetlands.  Will definitely be returning.  Thank you.
Very friendly staff, immaculate amenities and very clean park with lots of actives for the kids, great location  10/10
Great winter escape (with indoor pool and splashpark). Nice walk along the beach (at low tide) into town. Staff really friendly and helpful.
Fantastic facilities for families. Loved the extra events during school holidays.

Great park for kids. Plenty for them to do and super close to the beach. My only dislike was the fact that there is only one way in and one way out, even if you are on foot, making it a decent walk to the beach if you are camping down the back even though it's only 50-100 metres away as the crow flys. I do understand the security advantages of having it that way though.

We stayed on one of the ensuite caravan sites, which is a great set up. All the facilities are great, perfect for families from little kids to teens. All the staff are all really helpful, kind and will do anything they reasonably can to help you out.

We had an ensuite site with concrete. Was a perfect first caravan trip for us. The bathroom was way better than expected. Received texts when something arises at park like water off for 20 mins. Staff were so friendly. My children loved the movie night and swimming pool.

This was our first visit to Big4 Inverloch and it was honestly the best! We travelled in the July school holidays, and even though it was a little rainy it was still an amazing holiday for us and the kids. The splash park and pool, while too cold for me, the kids LOVED! They would have stayed there all day if we let them. The jumping pillow was great and the skate track and basketball was fun! While busy during the day the park was remarkably quiet and peaceful at night. The cabin we stayed in was great (Poolside Villa) with heaps of room for the family and great cooking facilities too. We loved our stay so much we have already booked for the July school holidays again in 2026!

We loved the kids facilities, it’s a very well equipped park with plenty to keep kids busy. We booked the smallest cabin to keep it affordable, these cabins need an upgrade though. The shower needs a door, not a curtain. The bathroom floor semi flooded every time any of us had a shower causing me to mop up with our towels, therefore needing to go and ask for extra towels. For a six sleeper cabin there is one towel rail meaning I had to have the clotheshorse out the entire time to have dry towels.

Our queen bed felt like it was higher at the foot end and my legs were slightly raised. I had to sleep opposite ways to my husband because the lop sided bed gave me pins n needles in legs.

We did love the park but the cheap cabins need an upgrade. When I’m spending nearly $400 for two nights I would expect to have a shower that doesn’t cause water to go all over the floor needing mopping up.
Also, PowerPoints next to each side of queen bed would be good to each parent has a charger.

See you next time with our tent :)

The place is amazing, spent the 3 days and two nights with plenty rain. The rain didn't deter the kids, indoor heated pool and indoor splash park was awesome.  Our kids spent a considerable time there. Amenities like the kitchen and toilets are clean. When the rain stopped, the girls made use of the go kart, play ground and jumping pillow. Highly recommend this place all year round, especially those rainy seasons, kids won't get bored.

Fantastic facilities, so so much to keep the kid’s busy. Beautiful clean park close to the beach and town. Amazing staff thank you for taking such good care of us during our stay. Cannot wait to stay again.
Perfect place to stay in Inverloch- plenty of things for kids to do so parents/grandparents can relax, pizza van on site was a bonus, activities for kids to do for free - what more could you ask for

We love the place! The amenities for the kids were really good.. The location was nice very close to the beach and shops.The ensuite can be cleaner though. The service was very good. We will come back in the summer!
Very well for all ages, loved it!
Clean and spacious cabin.

Stayed at BIG4 Ingenia Inverloch recently and had a great time. The accommodation was clean, comfortable, and well-equipped—our cabin had air‑con, kitchenette, and cozy furniture. Loved the easy walk to the beach and main shops in town  .

The facilities really shine: indoor pool, splash park, tennis courts, playgrounds—and there’s even a jumping pillow that was a hit with the kids  . Everything was well maintained and family‑friendly.

Location is spot on—right across from Anderson Inlet and a super short stroll to the foreshore and local cafés  .

All up, a top‑quality family‑friendly holiday park that delivers on comfort, location, and fun facilities. Would happily stay again.

We had a good stay. The weather held out luckily. The kids had an awesome time! They were definitely occupied with the range of activities in the park which was great. I think their favourites were the games room and jumping pillow.
A couple of misses for were the bbqs, the fact that the access to the jumping pillow and basketball court closed at 5.30pm.
The bbqs were just not hot enough and took ages to cook.
Also it would be great if there was an easier way for the kids to play in the games room. A couple of things in there should have been free.. It was a money pit!! Between our 3 families we spent approx. $200!!!!

The park facilities are great. The pool and waterpark were a hit however disappointing to see it only open until 7pm instead ofits orginal closing time of 9pm The activity program for the kids was very minimal. Only really 1 activity which was the 6pm movie. Would be good to see more school holiday activity daily programs like other big4 holiday parks where workers actually interact with the kids. The gravel roads around cabins pool alot of big puddles and consequently make it hard to keep cabin floors clean when no mop is provided. Concrete in these areas would be of benefit. Staff were lovely as always.

Requested an ensuite site, told none available. The ensuite next to me was not used the entire time I was at the park.
There was no toilet paper in the ladies or in the unisex toilets. (Every time I went to use the loo) There needs to be more bins around the caravan sites and perhaps another playground and the other end of the park.
Good location and perfect time for stopping
Great family accommodation, with plenty of things for the kids to do. Having access to Local Aquadome pools for free is a plus on the cooler days.

Great family friendly holiday park in Lakes Entrance. We recently stayed here for a few nights & would come back again.

Staff were lovely & friendly. Cabin was clean & spacious. Self-contained with kitchenette & full sized fridge (bonus!). They have laundry facilities on site (we didn't use). Onsite parking right next to our cabin too which was very convenient.
Kids loved the pools (3 pools for different age groups), and some games in the Arcade room (although a bit dated).

Excellent location. Close to the beach, restaurants & shops. Lots to do around the area for families - beach, boat hire, mini golf, parks. Plenty of good dining options & seafood restaurants too
We stayed 5 days and had a great time here. We hope that the Wi-Fi in cabin will be upgraded when we next holiday visit.

We stayed over christmas and had an enjoyable time. There is internet in the park however isnt great in the cabins. We were able to hotspot off our phones and the kids were able to watch TV with no issues when they needed to.

Would be a zero but not allowed. Terrible customer service and very bad communication. Trying to cancel my booking due to unforeseen circumstances and they are refusing to refund me the amount I paid less the deposit and $20 handling fee, which I completely understand I won't be refunded. There needs to be better, clearer T&Cs, along with communication emails when amounts are being paid. At no point was I ever told that the despoit amount was 50% of the total price and that I would not be refunded this. Please beware when dealing with them.

There is no internet in the cabin. If you have kids, you will struggle if they want to watch any device. Almost nothing works in the gaming room. Pool table and table tennis bats, the conditions are so bad even museums will reject them. Swimming pool are not heated. I will never go there again. We booked for 3 nights, it was so bad we had to leave after 2 nights and of course we didn’t receive any refunds. If you have kids, don’t ruin their holiday. There are plenty of better options there.

Fantastic site in jervis bay!! Front desk staff was awesome of replying and getting us settle.
Facilities was very tidy!!! A perfect getaway to jervis beach which is just a few steps away!
Very clean
Beautifully laid out cabin park with excellent recreational facilities and BBQ and outdoor and indoor seating great for social gatherings

Clean, comfortable and well appointed villa. Free BBQ facilities and complimentary passes to local gym. Beautiful park conveniently located just out of main town but still within walking distance. The main beach is also a short walk away. Paulina is so welcoming and friendly and made our stay so much more enjoyable. Looking forward to our next stay 😎

As an older couple we  found it to be very average, no accessible cabins ( have stayed at other big4 parks) bathrooms very small shower likewise very inaccessible for those with mobility issues. Wifi very poor. Would not stay here again.

Fantastic host
I will highly recommend people to stay here, cabins are clean and uptodate and modern. Host is amazing, friendly, and very accomodating, a true ambassador for the big 4.

The cabin was perfect for what we needed, generous sized dining/lounge area in between the rooms and the cabin was very clean.

The caravan park is a good size and offers a lot to do for kids with the amenities available and the location of the park was perfect! Directly across the road from 1 of the mini golf places and 20mins walk or 5 mins drive to the beachfront, cafes & shops! Will definitely be returning 😊

We have come from Melb to stay for my daughter’s 13th birthday. Our cabin is so beautiful - immaculately clean, really nice furniture, much bigger than expected. The service is friendly and accommodating and the facilities are so much fun. Can’t wait to come back.
the indoor playground balls its not much to play, the top of slide need to clean , its so much dust. Hand sanitiser should provide

We stayed at BIG4 Traralgon Park Lane Holiday Park last weekend, and honestly, the experience was above our expectations. The staff were extremely friendly, welcoming, and always happy to help, which made our stay even more enjoyable.

The rooms were very clean, comfortable, and well maintained. One of the best parts of this place is the huge range of activities and entertainment options for kids. There was always something fun to do, and our family truly loved every moment there.

The whole atmosphere of the park was relaxing, family friendly, and perfect for a weekend getaway. We had such a wonderful time and will definitely be staying here again and again in the future.

Highly recommended for families looking for a clean, fun, and welcoming holiday park!

When I visit Traralgon, I always stay at Park Lane, the staff are friendly and helpful, and although it is kid orientated, they are mainly in the dedicated play areas, mainly young families during the weekend. During the week it is fairly quiet. Close to both Morwell and Traralgon, and centrally located to the surrounding tourist locations. Facilities are great, and most sites are drive through. Great coffee☕️ at reception.

We stayed here in our van so can't comment on the rooms.

Fantastic park for kids so much for them to do.

Friendly and informative staff

First class bathrooms and laundries.

Barista coffee machine in the office with a wide range of  emergency groceries items even wine and beer :)

Been staying with park lane for over 20 years and overtime i return am still being looked after they go above and beyond |Such a friendly great atmosphere for kiddos absolutely highly recommend hats off to Mark and his team 👏 fantastic lovely little gem ♡♡♡

Perfect place for the family .. Frieny staff , non pushy , very nice and cooperative. Nice and clean units and lots of activities for the kids. I been to many Big4 places but we really love that

Strongly recommend this place.
Only place to stay in Traralgon

We had the best stay. Booked the day of, staff were so helpful on the phone and booking online was easy. Staff were so kind and very welcoming. Fantastic facilities especially for kids and families. They have everything on site, you barely need to leave. Kids had such a good time they wanted to stay longer. Everything was very well maintained and clean. Great atmosphere. Highly recommend and will be back.

We had a great weekend stay at this park. The drive through ensuite sites meant us and the family we were staying with could face each other. Our six combined kids ranging between 4-11 had so much fun at the park and were kept entertained with the many on site activities. The price of the site was very reasonable and the staff were very friendly. We will definitely be back again!

We Stayed here for a week the water was switched of 3 times
I don’t no how they let customers request sites that they have previously stayed on
It should be first in first served our they will allocate a spot to someone over the phone and hold it for them even if you are on that site before them they will move you just to accommodate that booking don’t Understand
Only thing I can fault is that a 6 person family cabin only had a couch big enough for 2 adults and 1 kid other kids had to sit on the floor.

The 3 nights we stayed in new (4 month old) cabins in the centre of the park (ours was #45) over Anzac Day weekend 2025 we found all very clean and everything worked ...TVs in main living and bedroom areas, 4 kids bunks , kitchen stocked with utensils and bathroom with shampoo/body wash/conditioner. Within the park we found BBQs, laundry with paywave payment washers and dryers, spa (pre-booked for private use), pool, Lazer tag, clip & climb and shop with essentials and coffee.  All more than acceptable, with the exception of my wife slipping down the wooden stairs without anti-slip treatment leading to the cabin - watch out when wet.  We extended for a 4th night to an older cabin on the outer edge of the park - big mistake...old is OK (am not young), not maintained adequately was not.  Front sliding door and sliding insect screen only locked with immense jiggling to get it in the perfect spot, kitchen bench invaded by ants, shower so noisy with water hammer in the pipes short showers were imperative and the bed ...so, so bad...so old and worn out you sank into the middle of it >> put a bit downer on our holiday.  We aired our concerns directly with the park before writing here ... disappointingly, no response.  So the moral of the story is we should have just stayed in the new cabins pictured below ...which we would recommend and stay in again. Older cabins - not recommended.

Returned 1 year later, April 2026:
Stayed in same (newer) cabins in centre of park at previous visit above.  Anti-slip treatment since added to stairs.  Everything in the cabin worked, was clean and still had that new feeling. On site mini-golf, pool and spa were great, albeit spa could have been warmer as was not near hot.  Clip and climb and Lazer tag also available, but we had no time to try.  BBQs clean, although camp kitchen oven (we had only microwave in our cabin) not.  Relaxing place for a holiday.
Didn't stay at the park, visited for the mini golf. Lots of fun 🙂

We had so much fun. Clean house, friendly staff, great service and fantastic endless fun in the heated outdoor pool . Fun inside games and activities on raining days. We would love to come back again.

2nd stay at Traralgon Big4 Holiday Park and again very happy.
This time we were in a 2 bedroom cabin with 2 queen beds.
Excellent beds plus all the 'mod cons' you would expect for a high end holiday cabin.
Highly recommended
It was a wonderful experience. The rooms are very clean, comfortable beds. If you need anything they are always there. The activities are amazing. We had an excellent time. Definitely recommend them

Good:
Kids activities, friendly staff, campers were respectful.
Bad:
Toilets/showers are inadequate and cleaned once a day. Really scummy by days end. And toilet paper ran out over night.
The go carts are too tough for our 7 and 11 y/o kids to use. They need to be serviced.
Everywhere you look, the park needs some serious maintenance!!!
We had our water tap and pit in the middle of our site. A real inconvenience.

We didn't let these things damper our spirits but we will not be returning anytime soon.
In the winter the bedrooms are cold as no heating vent but otherwise all is really good.

Great caravan park, our first experience in a Big4.

We stayed in a self contained unit, it was small but great for the 3 of us.
Great place to stay with the family
Me and the family had a great time we all loved the caravan park

Absolutely amazing holiday park. Staff couldn’t do enough to help you us with tv not working within 10 min all fixed and new tv installed. The amenities were amazing except the splash park water was cold was not expecting that but still amazing and great facility

We stayed in a coastal villa, which was absolutely beautiful. Very well maintained and appointed. The caravan park is a wonderful haven for families, and just a couple of minutes to Anderson inlet. A very enjoyable stay, we look forward to coming back.
Great location and safe all around family friendly and per friendly with a lot of space

We first visited this park three years ago but, unfortunately, experienced an unforeseen accident that left me with lingering anxiety about returning. Despite my hesitation, I decided to put that anxiety aside and I’m so glad I did.

From the moment we arrived, everything exceeded our expectations. The park itself is incredible clean, well-maintained, and full of activities for the kids. I felt completely at ease letting them run around and explore safely, which is something I truly value as a parent.

What really stood out, though, was the staff. Every single person, from the reception team to the ground staff, was warm, welcoming, and genuinely caring. They made us feel right at home and helped erase any of the nerves we had about coming back.

The cabins were modern, spacious, and perfectly suited for two families to stay comfortably. We often stay at different BIG4 parks, but this one has definitely earned a permanent spot on our list.

Thank you for such a wonderful stay and for helping my children create the beautiful memories they missed out on the first time around.
Great place to stay

We had a fantastic family holiday at the Inverloch BIG4 Ingenia Holiday Park! From the moment we arrived, the service was outstanding — the staff went above and beyond to accommodate our needs and made us feel so welcome.

We stayed in a Superior Villa, which was incredibly spacious, clean, and comfortable — perfect for a relaxing family getaway. The amenities throughout the park were excellent, especially for children. Our 2-year-old absolutely loved the splash park and could hardly be convinced to leave it each day!

There was so much for families to enjoy, and the atmosphere was friendly and relaxed. We couldn’t have asked for a better experience. Highly recommend for anyone looking for a fun, family-friendly holiday destination!

Decided to go with the “Palm Waters Unit” as my wife, 2 x kids and I prefer to have a quieter experience and we were sufficiently satisfied with the “out of the way” location with everything you need from a self contained apartment - more like airBnB with the entire house to yourself with drive-in enclosed garage, full access to all the park’s facilities including the awesome indoor heated waterpark and indoor heated pool … perfect for a winter escape without the crowds
Even if you have infants or newborn and need your own thing - this apartment will suit perfectly. The cafe 30 metres away does bangin’ hot chips btw 👌

We had such a great time on our weekend away at Big4 Ingenia Holidays Inverloch. The park itself is modern with lots of well maintained facilities and activities for the kids. My kids particularly loved the indoor heated pool and the jumping pillow.

We loved the location too. We thoroughly enjoyed the walk (about 10 - 15 minutes) along the esplanade in to town to grab a coffee each morning. There are beautiful views across the water along the way.

I would highly recommend this place to anyone, especially those with young families.
Very clean and well maintained
Couldn't fault it

Great experience with the team and big 4 whiters lakes entrance. Rooms great kids play are good. The staff amazing have been here twice for a Reunion and used the room such a great area for large group gatherings.
Highly recommend
Second stay here. Great location - walking distance to everything and our room was super clean.

Very clean and comfortable room, excellent location, great facilities.. Bed very comfortable and good pillows. Staff exceptionally friendly. They were very helpful to me when i left something valuable behind. I highly recommend this lovely park
It was a beautiful relaxing place to stay at. The service was amazing and  very friendly.
My husband and I took the advantage of stay 3 nights pay for 2 . We were very pleased with the cabin it was very cosy self contained had all we needed. Very good value. Will stay again.

My daughter and I stayed for one night on the way home from Wilson's Prom where we copped a night of cold rain and wind. We booked a deluxe cabin and it provided just the warmth and comfort we needed. Booking was easy and the reception lady was very welcoming and helpful. The park was well set out and equipped, I would stay again when in Lakes Entrance.
The office staff were extremely accommodating and knowledgeable about local events and food. Their friendly help made the trip that much nicer.

Nice quiet park . Stayed in the caravan ensuite , great idea but it was lose small gravel that gets into everything. Tared or cement would of been great. Don't like to winge but it's a park . Short drive to any where in lakes . Great facilities and well looked after .

We recently travelled from Melbourne to Sydney via coastal highway in a motorhome. We stayed at several places enroute but the best in all aspects was Big4 Whiters at Lakes Entrance. It is impeccably clean especially all the toilets. The common areas are very well taken care of. Plenty of activities to keep children busy. We especially enjoyed their Cinema Room. Would love to stay there again.

Really enjoyed our time here. Staff were very friendly, facilities clean and lots of activities for the kids. Would highly recommend anyone who is coming to the area to stay here and can’t wait for our next visit here.

Big 4 Whiters in Lakes entrance was wonderful! It is clean, warm and well
Maintained. It’s safe and fun for kids with carts to hire, a fun games room, pools, tennis and basketball courts and a different movie each night! Service was exceptional with Brandon being so kind, friendly and accommodating! Just a short walk from playgrounds and the beach. We can’t wait to go back!

Great place to get away for a couple of days. Any longer and you will have to think about amenities such as toilet paper, shampoo and just general things as its not really provided. Beds are a little uncomfortable so 2 or 3 days is it. Staff are very friendly and welcoming. There's a little games room but would do with a little revamp or bit more to it. All in all its a good place to stay.
A great place for a family to stay.
Great holiday park. Easy walk to the shops, cafes, playground, lake and beach. Great location!
One of the cleanest & well maintained Holiday park I have stayed at. Staff were friendly and very helpful.

If you are coming here for the kids activitys dont waist your time. Website states that kids activities are opened during school holidays. Monday we got here the pool was closed Tuesday high ropes were closed all day and they closed Lazer tag saying someone broke the guns. Today we were informed that the high rope course won't be opening until Friday the day we are leaving because they are short staffed. Defiantly would not bother coming back here again and regretting coming here very disapointing

This park is amazing and I just can’t express my gratitude to the staff, when we arrived I had a problem with my water inlet connection breaking off my caravan and the staff went out of their way to go to Bunnings to help me. It’s Easter time and they had egg painting followed by such a fun colour run which the adults got to enjoy also and then tomorrow there is an Easter egg hunt. The whole family has been made to feel welcome, it’s a safe park with endless fun activities we will 100% be back and would recommend to all especially those with kids!

Von netten Damen empfangen worden. Der Park ist sehr gepflegt & die farbigen Cabins sehen sehr schön aus. Unser Ensuit- wahrscheinlich neuer- war sehr sauber & mit Duschtücher ausgestattet. Die Lage ist mittelmässig- zu Fuss gelangt man nirgends hin. Werden wir aber trotzdem weiterempfehlen.

What an amazing team of people. Amanda thankyou so much for helping me through my dilemmas, the guys running the fun park were heaps of fun and great with the kids, Isabella keep on smiling it made my day.
Great

We had a fantastic experience at BIG4 Traralgon. The customer service was outstanding. When we arrived, there was a car parked on our site, but the staff took the issue very seriously and had it removed quickly without any fuss. They were incredibly helpful and even assisted with organising our power and water hookup, which made settling in so easy. It’s clear the team really cares about their guests. A great park with excellent service — we would happily stay again.

This caravan park is on a highway with an airfield behind. If you are looking for a quiet retreat do not go here!
They seem to like packing everyone into as small a space as possible while leaving most of the rest of the park empty. They put us and three other vans on the first 4 sites right inside the park close to the highway and the entry so everyone entering or leaving had to drive past us. The rest of the park was virtually empty. The sites are not level (this appears to be so they dont flood) the concrete slabs are often broken and uneven causing a tripping hazard. The toilets and other amenities need a good deep clean.

Our family of 5 stayed for one night over the weekend in a family cabin. The kids loved the laser tag, two rounds of mini golf, driving the carts, the kids play room and train ride. Unfortunately the pool was being cleaned the day we arrived however there was more than enough for them to do. The cabin was very well equipped and could easily stay here comfortably for a few days. Reception service was good and we had a great stay!

Disappointing stay. Booked 3 nights midweek for the kids to have some fun. Indoor play centre was fine but laser tag and the rope courses only open weekends and school holidays - no mention of that when we booked. Pool was closed due to maintenance without any notification to guests so found out the hard way after getting the whole family into their swimmers and walked over to find a locked chain on the gate - really poor communication. Mini golf is charged at $5 per guest if you want to take part in that, even for an infant! Washing machines are card only but charge 7.5% surcharge! Never seen a card surcharge that high anywhere in the country. Grey water drain on powered sites in elevated approx 300-350mm off the ground so touring vans will struggle to drain their grey water. Park map shows a gym onsite, however no such gym exists. Staff members in vehicles and buggies do not obey the speed limit in the park, constantly speeding near our site where my children play, and driving in the gutter beside our awning to avoid the speed bump.
Ordered a grass site but got gravel and dirt! The only one at the whole park.. otherwise, great accommodation apart from that. Ropes course was good.

The pictures on the website looked great, but in reality, it was very different from what we expected.

The swimming pool is small and not very clean, and it was overcrowded with many families in the tiny space.
Most activities in the park, like rope courses, mini golf, and laser tag, require extra payment.
There were supposed to be planned activities for kids, such as crafting and movies, but these didn’t actually happen, which was very disappointing.

The cabin was clean, comfortable.

Overall, we don’t think this Big4 was worth the price we paid.

Great holiday park. Kids had a ball and really enjoyed our mini getaway. Have decided to book again but longer. Staff were all so friendly and helpful, even  under pump and lines out the door. Highly recommended ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

We had a lovely long weekend stay. The spa Cabin was totally value for money. Our grandchildren loved playing while we watched from the undercover deck. Everything we needed was inside including a washing machine which we used.|We loved the high ropes course and the kids enjoyed the mini golf and all the bike riding they did around the roads. Fun all round.|Perfect place for a getaway.
Great place to stay. Nice clean cabin and a comfy bed.

We had a lovely long weekend stay. The spa Cabin was totally value for money. Our grandchildren loved playing while we watched from the undercover deck. Everything we needed was inside including a washing machine which we used.
We loved the high ropes course and the kids enjoyed the mini golf and all the bike riding they did around the roads. Fun all round.
Perfect place for a getaway.
Good family orientated park relaxed atmosphere
Awesome park for a winter getaway, kids loved the indoor pool and splash park
We had a slab ensuite site and loved the location we had. The facility’s were perfect for winter and we really enjoyed our stay.
Great facilities, close to beach; local shops, cafes, etc. Lovely owners/ staff. Would highly recommend.
Great and accommodating staff, great amenities and all round great park. Will visit again
Overall great stay. Very child friendly. Great communication from staff. Easy to check in and out. Couple of small challenges but nothing that would prevent us going back.

We stayed on a drive through site and loved it! The sites are so long and have fake grass between the concrete. The kids facilities are amazing and the staff are so friendly! Driveways  are wide and the layout of the park is good too. The beach is a block away and the town is walkable distance too!

Staff were friendly and there was plenty for children to do, however I was underwhelmed for the premium price. It seemed like there were little pieces of rubbish all over the campsites and playground, and the jumping pillow was a lot smaller than at other locations we have visited. My little ones were unable to jump around safely because there was not enough room separating them from the big kids who were enjoying the space. I also think the pool temperature was tolerable, but certainly a few degrees colder than comfortable.
Great experience. Great little get away. Something different

We have just checked out of our stay in one of the luxury safari tents and had the BEST stay! The safari tent was so beautiful and stayed super warm. The kids loved all the amenities (especially the splash park). Highly recommend and we will definitely be coming back!!
Absolutely loved the park perfect location to beach and shops,couldn’t ask for anything else fantastic Thankyou .If I could suggest a fenced off Dump point could be handy lots of little kids playing

We had a great 1 night stay in the eco glamping tent whilst passing through. The tent had everything you needed and plenty of space.. double bunks in a separated area! Heating throughout was much appreciated. Kitchen had everything needed including a portable electric stove if cooking is preferred. Spacious bbq area and outdoor dining table + fire pit shared between glamping tents was a nice touch.
Location was great for a walk along the beach and a corner store next door was convenient.
The only letdown were the beds/mattresses too soft for our liking. We sunk in and wasn't the most comfortable sleep. The jump pad and indoor water playground also weren't operational during our stay.
Otherwise a great, clean and comfortable option for a short stay.
Big 4 Inverloch was a fantastic place to take the family for the weekend. Plenty of activities for everyone which kept the kids happy (and parents too). Will definitely be back again 🌸

Powered site drive though.
Busy with delightful families of young children Saturday. Peaceful Sunday.
Very good clean facilities and park area.
Warm pool was enjoyed.
Fabulous you are now a pet friendly park.
Leash free beach area a short walk away.
Hoping for a dog wash down area at our next visit.

the park overall is great and the staff when we checked in were super lovely . A highlight was for sure the Proximity to the beach,  amazing for a morning walk and would definitely be fantastic in the warmer months. we had such a great time I just had a few little things , first night we had no power, luckily we were camping with others so we could piggy back off of their power outlet.
The other big thing is the communal area for campers, for the size of the park there definitely isn’t enough space for everyone to cook or utilise the kitchen area.  both days there seemed to be one big group having a big birthday so we weren’t really able to go in and use the kitchen when needed, also the kitchen was at the front of the park and we were camped all the way in the back, that’s was a little disappointing.
the last thing which isn’t really a big deal but worth mentioning is that it would have been great to have a campfire area but the only campfire we seen was reserved only for the safari tent members, which to my knowledge went unused both nights, a bit of a shame.
Other than that it really was a nice park , the kids really enjoyed the splash park/pool and gaming area so we would stay again,  I just wouldn’t camp.

My Family and I, absolutely LOVED our stay here. Friendly and welcoming Staff. My 2 year old and 7 year old had lots of FUN. The Villa's were spacious, comfortable and clean. Plenty of room to sit back and relax.
We will definitely be back when visiting Lakes Entrance. Highly Recommend... especially for Families... Thank you 😊 🙏
Friendly staff.  Accommodation is very good. No complaints what so ever.

Real doonas/quilts!!! Great stay - stayed in an older 2 bed cabin. We don't mind older cabins, the kitchens always seem bigger and the shower has a small tub for little ones. Linen was new, freshly pressed and mattresses and lounge were comfortable. I hate when hotels have the doona inbetween 2 sheets so this was just the best. Games room costs but good mix of things and we did lots outside, basketball, playground and go carts. Reception staff were very welcoming and helpful. Highly recommend. Also looked like it had a babies bathroom for campers which we are always on the lookout for.

We stayed in a studio cabin - it was totally clean and very cosy during the very cold night - they had even put the aircon on so it was warm when we walked in!  I asked them for no deodorisers and they didn’t use any so it didn’t smell at all.  Would recommend it for the good value and kind service- car parked beside stairs.  Cotton dishcloth was a nice functional touch - It was great for a stopover.
Great accomodation. Amazing water pressure a day very friendly and helpful staff.

We stayed in a 2 person cabin. It was well enough equipped for us but the place smelled really bad and was clearly extremely old. The design was old fashioned and the walls were yellowed. The family movie is actually a kids movie night, rather than something everyone can watch. On the plus side we enjoyed the pool, was never really any hassle to get a lounger, and it's a pretty short walk to the main street

Friendly, helpful staff.
Accommodation was convenient and good value for money.
A comfortable overnight stay.
Good enough.
A very fun concept. Nice location and very reasonable price. Only downside is you will have to pay for laundry etc.

Sehr einfache Unterkunft in einem kleinen Ferienpark. Für eine Nacht auf der Durchreise okay.
Preis/Leistung passt
Cabin was modern, clean and spacious. Park is very clean and tidy, well laid out. Location is great. Close to foreshore and town. We will definitely come back
Comfortable accommodation. Good accessable cottage, even has a comfortable couch! Quiet spot close to shops.

Saved the day |I buggered up my booking, arrived with a dog in a “no dogs” park🥴|Brendan couldn’t have been more helpful, arranged alternative accommodation,sorted out the cancellation with the booking agent, all with a smile. I was astounded by the level of service and friendliness.

Booked a garden cottage with their deal,  stay for three and pay for two. We asked to move from Cottage No 26 as the bed had a stale urine smell. Sure enough when the protective layers were rolled back the mattress had a few old urine patches. Staff member offered to spray with an antibacterial product but I said it would only mask the offensive smell. She willingly offered another cottage which we accepted. These properties should be regularly inspected for such revolting mattresses. First time staying at a Big 4 but will consider other options in future.

9 night stay. 2 bedroom cabin . So spacious, clean, comfortable. Car park next to cabin . Friendly and informative greeting . Home away from home. Gardens beautifully maintained. Quiet. Would not hesitate in staying again. Walking distance to Main Street . Did the op shops also.
9 nights stay in 2 bedroom cabin . Wow . Spacious, clean , comfortable , quiet, parking next to cabin. Friendly and informative greeting. Great location. Thumbs up
Cute little cottage with everything you need. Very friendly atmosphere
Excellent facility and friendly staff. Recommend to anyone visiting Lakes Entrance. Great for kids with great games room and swimming pool. Ideal location.

⭐ Very disappointing experience – misleading facilities

We booked our stay at Big4 Traralgon park lane for a family holiday, travelling from very far  with small kids, mainly because the website advertised many kid-friendly facilities. Unfortunately, almost none of them were usable.

Main issues:
•	The website advertised rope climbing, laser tag, spa, swimming pool, DVD movie area, kids play area, and Wi-Fi, but most of these were not working during our stay.
•	Wi-Fi is available but there is no signal at all, making it unusable.
•	Spa was broken, and staff said it could not be fixed because it was a public holiday.
•	Laser tag & Ropr climbing were closed . Staff said it only operates during school holidays — however, school holidays were still ongoing, yet the facility was closed.
•	DVD player was broken, and when asked, staff had no solution.
•	With all facilities unavailable, kids had nothing to do. Even staying inside and watching movies was not possible due to no Wi-Fi and a broken DVD player.
. Pool was open however it doesn’t look clean or maintained.

Staff experience:
•	Staff were not helpful or supportive.
•	The response we kept getting was: “We can’t do anything”.
•	No alternatives, compensation, or effort to resolve issues were offered.

Overall experience:
•	We spent a lot of money expecting a quality family holiday.
•	Because most facilities were broken and not maintained, it turned into one of the worst holiday experiences we’ve had.
•	If facilities are unavailable, this should be clearly mentioned on the website, especially during peak holiday periods.

Final thoughts:
This park has potential, but poor maintenance, misleading advertising, and unhelpful staff completely ruined our family holiday. I would not recommend this place to families with kids unless all facilities are properly working and honestly advertised.

So disappointing to stay at this big 4.  We stayed with 5 of us in a cabin which was really dated.  The curtains were broken, tiles in kitchen and bathroom broken, tv in cupbaord in bedroom no remote, walls fixed but not painted.  The checkin was terrible and they admitted they did not have enough staff.  They dont ring back.  Putting 2 tubs of slime on the table  with a handwritten note does not mean they are running a craft session.  The most disappointing was the tiny tiny pool (couldnt use it till later in the day as it needed extra cleaning) it is smaller than a backyard pool.  The sites are small and very little shade.  Give this place a big miss.  The ropes course is good but you pay for everything.  Come of people at least do the mini golf for free.
Very clean cabin. Lots for kids to do.

Espectacular lejos! El mejor hotel para ir en familia (especial chicos)! Lo entendieron todo! Habitaciones modernas, limpias, y cómodas! It's just ok. You get what u pay for It's just a caravan park. But......
Cabins are clean, master bed extremely uncomfortable.
The pool is amazing temperature but way to small, one day they closed the pool to clean it at 12.15pm. In the middle of a hot day.

The pool is tiny and water quality very poor, the family cabin bedrooms and bathroom is tiny however the living space was very comfortable. There were not enough supplies for a weeks stay and the cooking equipment was not usable. The cabins are very dated and had a serious bug issues. There were not enough blankets and towels were difficult to get changed. Some activities were an additional fee which I didn’t think is clear when making the booking. Just stayed here. Room was ok but if you want people to look after the place, you should probably provide cleaning equipment to do so..

Wifi: Gave us a cabin way down the back so when we tried to sign in, it said we were too far for signal. Maybe get some wifi extenders so guests can enjoy actual wifi.

We booked a cabin for 5 nights and were given a towel each… Definitely should’ve been provided more as you have to pay to wash and dry them in the shared laundry. No laundry powder provided at all in the room too, so you either have to have 1 dollar coins to buy some there, or buy a whole laundry powder from the supermarket to use 1 or 2 scoops out of.

Otherwise was an ok stay. Nothing amazing though.

Hands down the BEST place for families!
The friendly cleaning staff, park staff are welcoming, super helpful!
So much for kids and SUPER CHEAP prices..
WE WILL BE BACK

We contacted Big4 Traralgon Park to make arrangements for our stay across different groups, and Isabel assisted us so well.

Thank you very much for your help and support — it was greatly appreciated.

Great park with good facilities for kids.  Park is very clean and well maintained.  Cabins were beautiful with everything you could need for a few days away.
The camp shop sell most things you need, coffee in the morning and beer in the afternoon.
The only downsides are, when the site is busy, you will have to wait to be served in the office as there is often only one person working.  The  pool area is no where near large enough for the size of park.  At one point today there were 30 people in the pool where you were lucky to get standing room no chance of a swim.
Ropes course and mini golf are great fun and at a discount for park guests and of course a decent playground and the obligatory bouncy pillow.

Up date  Dec 2025- still a great place to stop.  Our ensuite suite was easy to access but the ensuite was starting to look a bit tired. Only little things like where a toilet roll holder had been replaced the holes and adhesive from the old ones hadn't been fixed. And really that's not important when compared to the fact that they supply big fluffy towels.😊

A great place for kids.
We were sited on a easy to access ensuite site . The ensuite was clean and well cared for.
The park is  dog friendly.

Amazing Park. I am in my 50's and when I was a kid, parks did not look like this. The activities and facilities are fantastic. They include Laser Tag, Indoor & Outdoor Play Areas, Jumping Pad, Ropes Course, Mini Golf, Licensed Kiosk and Fire Pits for the cooler months. Beautiful trees and gardens. With my superstition of numbers, they kindly upgraded us to a Family Cabin. Lovely staff. Our stay was so good, we stayed an extra night. Highly recommend and would definitely stay again :)
Most relaxing atmosphere accompany by friendly ,accommodating staff.Will stay again when travelling through.
Ropes course and laser tag only open weekends and school holidays yet still promoted on big 4 site. Give it a miss.

Great stay at the park. Easy process while family member was staying at a local hospital. No complaints at all. Nice and clean and easy access to all amenities and activities.  We will drfinatly be back for a more recreational visit instead hospital trip :)

Best camp-site
100% Clean
Lots of activities for kids,  they will never get bored, for all the weather condition. Amazing costumes service. Welcoming atmosphere and even organising family activities after dinner 🍽
Highly recommended

Looking forward to go back again soon

Great spot for a good quiet short holiday. The beach fishing is phenomenal , many species of fish to caught especially from the 13th track to the beach, but make sure you bring plenty insect repellent spray as the mozzie and the horse flies can be out of control. Caravan park has great facilities and was very quiet.

Such friendly service, we asked for availability pretty much last minute, the owners were so kind and accommodating.
Lovely camp area with trees and views.
Bathrooms are clean and tidy with running hot water.
The only downside was the play park area could be a little bigger and accomodating to all ages.
Easter is a busy time and we had a great experience. Thanks again.

Loch Sport Caravan Park is one of those relaxed coastal parks that reminds you why people love coming to places like Gippsland in the first place.

The park sits right in the middle of Loch Sport between Lake Victoria and the famous Ninety Mile Beach, so you’re perfectly positioned whether you’re into boating, fishing, beach walks, or just enjoying the quiet coastal lifestyle.

What really makes the place though are the owners Simon and Kylie. They’re friendly, approachable and clearly care about the park and their guests. It has that welcoming small-town feel that’s getting harder to find these days.

The park itself is well kept and peaceful. It’s an easy walk to the lake foreshore and only a couple minutes drive to Ninety Mile Beach.

I’m a Google Local Guide, and during our visit I actually created and published a Google Street View tour of the park so future visitors can explore the layout before arriving. Hopefully that helps people get a feel for the place ahead of time.

Loch Sport itself is a bit of a hidden gem — abundant wildlife, beautiful lake views, endless beaches, and a laid-back atmosphere that’s perfect if you want to slow down and enjoy nature.

If you’re travelling through the Gippsland Lakes region, Loch Sport Caravan Park is definitely worth stopping at.
Great park. Very clean. Helpful staff. We will be back.
Nice clean park, new owners went out of their way to make our stay nice. Great location for anyone into water sports.

To say I am grateful for the customer service and kind-hearted support I experienced from Simon and Kylie is a massive understatement!

A no-fuss late check in after the reception was closed- had hiked from Seaspray 4 days prior, no water left and a knee injury.
Friendly chats and enjoyed relaxing in Loch Sport so much that we decided to stay for a 2nd night.

An extreme wind picked up and the tent decided to go walkabout. Corralling our belongings we bunkered in the kitchen area.  Simon popped in to check on us and gave us a free upgrade to a lovley caravan annex.

Since the power was off for the afternoon due to the crazy winds, Kylie dropped be to offer us some potatoes and foil to cook in the fire. Although we had a gas stove this was greatly appreciated.

They have gone above and beyond any expectations I define as hospitality and I wish Simon and Kylie and their team the very best with their future.

Much gratitude and kind regards-

-Keith

Seemed like there was some effort just starting to upgrade the campground and facilities. A few mozzies around (early December) but would guess that there would be more at nearby bush camps.

Lovely park. Extremely clean. Very nice staff.

We were sad to leave our holiday and have already had discussions about making it an Easter tradition at the lovely park. But I have no doubt we'll return well before then as it is quickly becoming a favourite spot for our family.

Thanks Loch Sport Caravan Park. Until we meet again! Salmela and Briggs families.

Fisherman's paradise.
Just spent 2 nights there.  Friendy people. Sooo Quiet.  Clean Facilities.  Great night with Camp fire. Relaxing.
